title: centaurea × pseudorhenana
intro: Centaurea × pseudorhenana, also known as Pseudorhenan Knapweed, is a hybrid plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and is also said to have a positive effect on digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Centaurea × pseudorhenana include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
